title: deuro #1204
definition:
1) of place,
    1a) hither to this place
    1b) in urging and calling, here! come!
 2) of time, hither to, now
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) of place,
    1a) hither to this place
    1b) in urging and calling, here! come!
 2) of time, hither to, now

    NASB:  until now, come here!:
